# Local orphan checkouts

This directory is for local-only external checkouts that should not be committed.

## CUDA Kernel Optimization KB

`cuda-kernel-optimization-kb/` is a local reference checkout for CUDA kernel
optimization skill work.

- Source: <https://github.com/imsight-knowhow/cuda-kernel-optimization-kb>
- Checkout path: `extern/orphan/cuda-kernel-optimization-kb/`
- Purpose: CUDA kernel optimization `llm-wiki` vault with maintained articles in
  `wiki/`, immutable source material in `raw/`, and operation logs in `log/`.

This checkout is intentionally kept under `extern/orphan/` because it is a large
working knowledge base rather than part of the published skill package.
